post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will make your apps 3x faster ⚡
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will make your apps 3x faster ⚡

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: 4 Claude API Performance Hacks
slides.subtitle: Speed up your AI integrations today

slides.title: Use Cache Control
slides.body: Cache frequent prompts to reduce latency and costs. Perfect for system prompts and repeated context.

slides.title: Batch Similar Requests
slides.body: Group multiple related queries into one request instead of making separate API calls.

slides.title: Set Optimal Max Tokens
slides.body: Don't use default max_tokens. Set it based on expected response length to avoid unnecessary processing.
slides.code_snippet:
# For short answers
max_tokens=100
# For detailed explanations
max_tokens=1500

slides.title: Handle Errors Gracefully
slides.body: Implement exponential backoff for rate limits and proper error handling to maintain performance.

slides.title: Want More API Tips?
slides.body: Follow for daily Claude API tutorials and save this post for reference!
